channel.title: Packages on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Packages on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Email notifications for included usage thresholds
item.description:
GitHub now sends email alerts as an account’s included monthly usage approaches its thresholds.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Product-specific billing APIs are closing down
item.description:
GitHub is closing down the remaining product-specific billing APIs for Actions, Packages, and shared storage, following earlier notices about Actions workflow usage endpoints.

  • Source: GitHub
